content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach cleanly avoids every priority AoA anti-pattern. Turn 2 declines the bait to verdict the 'selfish' question (avoiding fixing-people and view-as-technique). The coach does not jump to compassion or partner-empathy before letting the want be felt (avoids dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger), does not skip to a 'deeper want is generous' spiritual reframe before the surface want is described concretely (avoids spiritual-narcissism), and does not fight the inner critic that called the want selfish — instead locating its origin in the mother (avoids dont-fight-the-voice). Questions are paced and connective rather than rapid-fire extraction (avoids wonder-as-strategy), and there is no methodology jargon or evangelism. Turn 14's 'trust that one' lands as confirmation of what the client already discovered, not coach-driven transformation.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to debate the 'selfish' verdict; declines the bait that would have tripped fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Redirects to the concrete want (the mountain) instead of policing or validating the should."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects state-shift without forcing transformation; loving as state, not as change agent."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single, spacious question; does not stack or extract."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the inherited pattern without jargon or evangelism; does not fight the critic."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Drops to body/felt sense rather than narrating insight at the client."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Confirms the client's own arrival rather than push for deeper breakthrough — avoids loving-to-transform."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Both listed anti-patterns to avoid (spiritual-narcissism, dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger) were successfully avoided."
}
